zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Preston 1st Baron of Gormaston於大約1330年出生在英國藍卡爾普雷斯頓時，他的父親Roger Preston40歲，母親Matilda Maud Preston14歲。他於1353年與Margeret de Bermingham在愛爾蘭萊音斯特迪 本 米亞斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1396年在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯格爾曼斯頓享年67歲。

nameMeanings.name: Preston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from one of the many places (most notably one in Lancashire) so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.
occasionally from Middle English prest + son ‘son of the priest’. Priests were forbidden marriage but many produced illegitimate offspring.

variants.name: Presson
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of   Preston  .
French: occupational name for a presser of wine or oil, from a derivative of presser ‘to press’.

variants.name: Prestwich
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place in Lancashire (now Greater Manchester), so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + wīc ‘outlying settlement’, or from other places with the same derivation. Variants such as Prestidge, Prestage, etc., parallel the local pronunciation of the Lancashire name. Compare Preston .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Preston 1st Baron of Gormaston was born about 1330, in Preston, Lancashire, England, his father, Roger Preston, was 40 and his mother, Matilda Maud Preston, was 14. He married Margeret de Bermingham in 1353, in Diocese of Meath, Leinster, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1396, in Gormanston, County Meath, Ireland, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Preston 1st Baron of Gormaston est né environ 1330, à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Roger Preston, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Matilda Maud Preston, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Margeret de Bermingham en 1353, à Diocese of Meath, Leinster, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1396, à Gormanston, County Meath, Irlande, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Preston 1st Baron of Gormaston um 1330 in Preston, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Preston 40 und seine Mutter Matilda Maud Preston 14. Er hat 1353 in Diocese of Meath, Leinster, Irland Margeret de Bermingham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1396 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Gormanston, County Meath, Irland.

Lui sposato Margeret de Bermingham nel 1353, nel Diocese of Meath, Leinster, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1396, nel Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda, all'età di 67 anni.

ko.Carbury and Dunfierth, County Kildare, I: 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 카버이 앤드 던피르스
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Preston 1st Baron of Gormaston(이)가 대략 1330년 영국 랭카실르 프레스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Preston(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda Maud Preston(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1353년 아일랜드 레인스터 디오스스 프 미스에서 Margeret de Bermingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1396년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 고먼스턴에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Preston 1st Baron of Gormaston nasceu aproximadamente 1330, em Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Preston, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Maud Preston, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Margeret de Bermingham em 1353, em Diocese of Meath, Leinster, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1396, em Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Preston 1st Baron of Gormaston родился около 1330 г. в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Preston было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda Maud Preston, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Margeret de Bermingham в 1353 г. в местности диосес оф мит, линстир, Ирландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1396 г. в местности горманстон, коунти мит, Ирландия в возрасте 67 лет.

Se casó con Margeret de Bermingham en 1353, en Diocese of Meath, Leinster, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija.
